examples.title: 🚨 A Mysterious Incident in the Jungle! You Won't Believe What Happened Next! 😱🔥
examples.explanation: The video starts with irrelevant visuals but diverges from the headline promise by the delivery frame.
examples.example_description: Sensational English headline on viral-style footage.

examples.title: আজকের শীর্ষ ৭ খবর | Shirsho 7 | 24 July 2026 | Independent TV | Independent TV
examples.explanation: The video starts with irrelevant visuals but diverges from the headline promise by the delivery frame.
examples.example_description: Independent TV news bulletin — straightforward headline.

examples.title: তিন দিনে আফগানিস্তানের পাঁচ প্রাদেশিক রাজধানী তালেবানের দখলে || [Taleban Situation]
examples.explanation: The video starts with irrelevant visuals but diverges from the headline promise by the delivery frame.
examples.example_label: Hard case — breaking news title, factual bulletin
examples.example_description: Human label: genuine. BanglaBERT title-only flags clickbait; VTCF reads the newsroom visuals correctly.

examples.title: বড় বোনের বিয়েতে সিনেমা স্টাইলে অপহরন ছোট বোন। অবাক করা এই কাজ করল বর নিজেই। দেখুন তোলপাড় সারাদেশ
examples.explanation: The video starts with irrelevant visuals but diverges from the headline promise by the delivery frame.
examples.example_description: Human label: clickbait. BanglaBERT title-only misses it; VTCF catches the mismatch from video frames.

research_note: Clickbait videos show LESS visual change on average than genuine videos because clickbait often reuses static footage rather than bait-and-switching content.
